name: JMPLS Classic Hoodie

name: Professional Padfolio
description: Sleek leather padfolio perfect for interviews and networking events.
details: Includes a legal-size notepad, pen holder, and pockets for business cards and resumes.

name: JMPLS Coffee Mug
description: Start your LSAT study sessions with our signature mug.

description: Lightweight, breathable tee for everyday wear.
details: 100% pre-shrunk cotton. Available in sizes S-XXL. Screen-printed logo front and center.

name: LSAT Prep Flashcards
description: Essential logic and reasoning flashcards by JMPLS.

details: 20oz capacity. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours.
